name: SiTime Corporation
description: SiTime Corporation is a leading provider of silicon timing systems, specializing in the development of micro-electromechanical systems (MEMS) based timing solutions. Headquartered in Santa Clara, California, the company designs and markets high-performance oscillators, resonators, and clock integrated circuits that replace traditional quartz-based timing devices. SiTime's products are widely utilized across various industries, including automotive, communications, enterprise, industrial, and consumer electronics, offering superior reliability, smaller form factors, and enhanced performance for modern electronic systems. As a fabless semiconductor company, SiTime focuses on innovation to address the complex timing challenges of advanced AI, 5G, and autonomous technologies.
